overview.description: The Invesco DB Commodity Index Tracking Fund (DBC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund tracks an index of 14 commodities. It uses futures contracts to maintain exposure and selects them based on the shape of the futures curve to minimize contango. DBC was launched on Feb 3, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Will an All-Weather Asset Plan Keep You Safe?
data.text: With a volatile market, inflation and more than a little anxiety over the possibility of recession, interest in the All-Weather Portfolio originated by Ray Dalio (Trades, Portfolio) is up.
